description: Style Notefrench connection tees indulge in a minimalist uncomplicated aesthetic. Layer this under a tailored blazer and fitted chinos, or for a pared down look, we recommend a fitted pair of denims with no distressing or wash. Style this with low top shoes without socks for maximum effect. Product DetailsGrey T-shirt, has a round neckline, short sleeves, embroidered and appliqué on the chest, brand patch above the hemline and centre back seamMaterial and care100% cottonMachine wash coldDo not bleach or tumble dryUse cool ironSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 6' and shoulders 18") is wearing a size M
